name: Jimmy Chérizier
role: Gang Federation Leader, Head of Viv Ansanm / G9
quote: We are not criminals. We are revolutionaries fighting against the oligarchy that has stolen this country from the Haitian people.

name: Ariel Henry
quote: Haiti needs peace. Haiti needs stability. I am making the ultimate sacrifice for that peace.

name: Garry Conille
role: Prime Minister (Jun – Nov 2024, removed by TPC)
quote: I accept this challenge in full awareness of the difficulties and the weight of expectations of the Haitian people.

name: Alix Didier Fils-Aimé
quote: Our priority is to create the conditions for free elections and to rebuild state authority with the support of our international partners.

name: Fritz Alphonse Jean
quote: Haiti's salvation lies in consensus among all Haitian actors, not in solutions imposed from outside.

name: Laurent Saint-Cyr
role: TPC President (Aug 2025 – Feb 2026); private sector representative
quote: Elections in 2026 are not optional. They are the only path to restoring Haiti's constitutional order.

name: Jovenel Moïse
quote: Haiti is a country of strong people who have never accepted slavery and will never accept it.

name: Martine Moïse
role: First Lady; assassination survivor; later indicted in Haiti
quote: They killed my husband in cold blood. I will fight for justice and I will fight for Haiti.

name: William Ruto
role: President of Kenya; led MSS lead nation (Jun 2024 – Apr 28, 2026); final contingent departed Apr 28, 2026
quote: Kenya stands with Haiti. We will not abandon the Haitian people in their hour of greatest need.

name: Carlos Ruiz Massieu
role: UN Special Representative for Haiti, Head of BINUH (2025–present)
quote: The humanitarian situation in Haiti requires urgent international action. The transition to the GSF must not create a security vacuum that gangs exploit.

name: Daniela Kroslak
role: Head of UN Support Office in Haiti (UNSOH), appointed Mar 2026
quote: The UNSOH will provide the logistics, intelligence, and operational support that the Gang Suppression Force needs to succeed where previous missions fell short.

name: Luckson Elan
role: Leader, Gran Grif gang (Artibonite); perpetrator of Pont-Sondé massacre
quote: Anyone who works against us will face the consequences.

name: Guy Philippe
role: Armed group leader; returned from US prison; involved in 2024 gang offensive
quote: I have returned to serve the Haitian people. The politicians have failed them and we will not.

name: Claude Joseph
role: Interim PM (Jul 2021); later indicted in Moïse assassination case
quote: All conspiracy theories about my alleged involvement are false. I served Haiti honorably during its darkest hour.

name: Jack Christofides
quote: The Gang Suppression Force represents a new chapter. We must build on MSS lessons and confront the gangs with the full force of international resolve.

name: Joseph Badio
role: Key assassination suspect; former Haitian Justice Ministry official
quote: I had nothing to do with the president's murder. These accusations are politically motivated.

name: Leslie Voltaire
role: First TPC President (May–Sep 2024); architect of TPC formation
quote: The Transitional Presidential Council is an imperfect solution for an impossible situation, but it is Haiti's best path forward.
